entries.content:
sudo apt update && brew install --cask python3 openssl readline libssl-dev libffi-dev
python3 -m ensurepip
python3 -c "import opencode; print(opencode.__version__)"
[Optional] python3 -m venv my_open_code_env && source my_open_code_env/bin/activate
